$comment: ESLint scaffolding for Forge AI frontend. Full ESLint adoption (with Next.js plugin) is a follow-up to Plan 0.5-01; this minimal config exists so editor extensions flag hex/HSL literals as the new code is written. The Phase 0.5-05/06 sweeps will remove all existing violations during the token swap.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Use semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-agent, etc.) instead of raw hex literals. See lib/design-system/forge-color-tokens.ts for the brand-locked palette.
Use semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-agent, etc.) instead of raw hex literals.
Tailwind utilities should reference CSS variables (hsl(var(--token))), not raw HSL values. The HSL values live in app/globals.css.
